name: Evigishki Neremanas
name_jp: イビリチュア・ネーレイマナス
desc: You can Ritual Summon this card with any "Gishki" Ritual Spell. If this card is Ritual Summoned: You can target 1 WATER monster in your GY; Special Summon it. Cannot be destroyed by battle with a monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck. Once per turn, when your opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can return 1 "Gishki" Ritual Monster you control to the hand, and if you do, negate the activation, and if you do that, shuffle it into the Deck.
mnst_eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with any "Gishki" Ritual Spell. If this card is Ritual Summoned: You can target 1 WATER monster in your GY; Special Summon it. Cannot be destroyed by battle with a monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck. Once per turn, when your opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can return 1 "Gishki" Ritual Monster you control to the hand, and if you do, negate the activation, and if you do that, shuffle it into the Deck.
eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with any "Gishki" Ritual Spell. If this card is Ritual Summoned: You can target 1 WATER monster in your GY; Special Summon it. Cannot be destroyed by battle with a monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck. Once per turn, when your opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can return 1 "Gishki" Ritual Monster you control to the hand, and if you do, negate the activation, and if you do that, shuffle it into the Deck.

action: Returns from your field to your hand
mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
